texto: Americans were convinced in their own minds that they were very miserable, and those who think so are so. There is nothing so easy as to persuade people that they are badly governed. Take happy and comfortable people and talk to them with the art of the evil one, and they can soon be made discontented with their government, their rulers, with everything around them, and even with themselves.
explicacao: Citação de Thomas Hutchinson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Americans were convinced in their own minds that they were very miserable, and those who think so…” articula reflexao, contentment, rebellion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como rebellion.
